design_philosophy.core_concept: Cyber-Security Audit Terminal. Raw, precise, and devoid of decoration. The design should feel like a specialized tool used by data privacy officers in a high-security facility.

typography.font_family_primary: JetBrains Mono, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
typography.font_family_secondary: JetBrains Mono, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
typography.instructions: Use Monospace font for EVERYTHING. Headings, body, buttons, inputs. This is a developer tool, it should look like code.

layout.structure: Split-screen or Top-Bottom (Responsive). Input on Left/Top, Output on Right/Bottom.
layout.spacing: Dense. Use p-4 for panels, p-2 for internal elements. Gap-4 for layout.
layout.glassmorphism: Not used. Use solid, opaque surfaces with 1px borders.

buttons.base_class: font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-xs h-10 px-6 border border-primary/50 hover:bg-primary hover:text-black transition-all duration-200

inputs.base_class: bg-black border border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 font-mono

badges.base_class: border-current bg-transparent font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider

sonner.style: border border-border bg-black text-white font-mono rounded-none

visual_enhancers.grid_background: Optional: Subtle 20px grid pattern in background color #111.
visual_enhancers.scanlines: Optional: Very subtle CRT scanline effect on the output panel.

animations.process: A 'glitch' effect or 'typing' effect when anonymizing.

accessibility.contrast: High contrast strictly enforced. WCAG AAA.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible thick outline (2px) in Primary Color.

assets.icon_style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Sharp join if possible.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use shadows (flat design only).
DO NOT use rounded corners (0px radius).
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' or system monospace for all text.
The UI should feel like a CLI tool wrapped in a GUI.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Configure tailwind.config.js to use the monochrome palette and 0px border radius default.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the Layout: A header with a 'Terminal' look, a main content area with two large textareas (Source, Anonymized), and a stats panel.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the 'Anonymize' function logic (mocked or real) with a visual delay/effect.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Use the 'sonner' toast for copy feedback.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure the output JSON syntax highlighting (simple color spans) follows the theme.
